headline: UBS Wary of Nike Inc. (NKE)’s Weak Global Sales but Barclays Confident of Bounce Back
summary: Nike, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) is one of the top Robinhood stocks with high potential. On March 19, UBS reiterated a Neutral rating on Nike Inc. (NYSE:NKE) but cut the price target to $58 from $62. The price cut is in response to the company’s weak global sales momentum. Consequently, it expects the company to deliver third-quarter […]

headline: Apple To $320? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Monday
summary: Top analysts changed outlook on top names: Deutsche Bank cut NKE, Goldman Sachs decr WFC target, Morgan Stanley raised GEV target, Roth Capital cut CSIQ target, Mizuho raised WLK target, Piper Sandler decr KHC target, Stifel incr LUNR target, UBS decr LUV target.
